cloud-clis.description: Cloud CLIs often hold access to accounts, deploys, registries, state, and production infrastructure from a local shell.
cloud-clis.label: Cloud CLI packages
cloud-clis.reason: Belongs to a cloud or infrastructure command family.

source-control-tools.description: Source-control packages can read or mutate repositories, issue trackers, release flows, and authenticated developer state.
source-control-tools.label: Source-control packages
source-control-tools.reason: Belongs to a source-control command family.

package-publishers.description: Package publishing tools can use registry tokens, sign artifacts, and push releases from an agent-controlled shell.
package-publishers.label: Package publisher tools
package-publishers.reason: Belongs to a package publishing or registry command family.

mcp-tools.description: MCP packages expose local tools, data, and service connectors to AI agents through Model Context Protocol servers or clients.
mcp-tools.label: MCP tool packages
mcp-tools.reason: Mentions MCP or Model Context Protocol.

secret-risk-packages.description: Packages with protected-tool coverage, approval-gate metadata, or non-low Geiger findings deserve explicit review before agents run them.
secret-risk-packages.label: Secret-risk packages
secret-risk-packages.reason: Has protected-tool coverage, approval-gate, or non-low Geiger security signals.

terminal-utilities.description: Command-line utilities with local package pages, executable metadata, and Automic Vault security notes.
terminal-utilities.label: Terminal utility packages
terminal-utilities.reason: Matched terminal and command-line workflow metadata.

text-processing-tools.description: Packages used to inspect, transform, search, render, or generate text and structured documents.
text-processing-tools.label: Text processing packages
text-processing-tools.reason: Matched text, document, or structured-data processing metadata.

archive-compression-tools.description: Packages that create, inspect, extract, or transform archives and compressed files.
archive-compression-tools.label: Archive and compression packages

developer-build-tools.description: Build systems, compilers, generators, and developer tools that influence local source trees and artifacts.
developer-build-tools.label: Developer build packages
developer-build-tools.reason: Matched build, compiler, generator, or developer workflow metadata.

language-runtime-packages.description: Language runtimes, package ecosystems, and interpreter-adjacent packages.
language-runtime-packages.label: Language runtime packages
language-runtime-packages.reason: Matched language runtime, compiler, or interpreter metadata.

networking-protocol-tools.description: Network clients, protocol utilities, download tools, and remote-service helpers.
networking-protocol-tools.label: Networking and protocol packages
networking-protocol-tools.reason: Matched network, protocol, or remote-service metadata.

media-graphics-tools.description: Packages that process images, audio, video, fonts, diagrams, or other media assets.
media-graphics-tools.label: Media and graphics packages
media-graphics-tools.reason: Matched media, image, audio, video, or graphics metadata.

database-data-tools.description: Packages that query, migrate, inspect, or operate databases and data files.
database-data-tools.label: Database and data packages
database-data-tools.reason: Matched database, SQL, migration, or data-store metadata.

security-crypto-tools.description: Security, identity, cryptography, password, signing, and certificate-related packages.
security-crypto-tools.label: Security and crypto packages
security-crypto-tools.reason: Matched security, identity, cryptography, password, signing, or certificate metadata.

scientific-computing-tools.description: Math, statistics, biology, chemistry, geospatial, and scientific computing packages.
scientific-computing-tools.label: Scientific computing packages

game-emulation-tools.description: Game engines, emulators, ROM tooling, and game asset packages.
game-emulation-tools.label: Game and emulation packages

documentation-tools.description: Documentation generators, manual page tools, static site tools, and publishing helpers.
documentation-tools.label: Documentation packages
documentation-tools.reason: Matched documentation, manual, or publishing metadata.

web-dev-tools.description: Web servers, frontend build tools, JavaScript packages, CSS tools, and browser-adjacent utilities.
web-dev-tools.label: Web development packages

desktop-app-packages.description: Homebrew Cask and desktop-app packages that are useful package-page navigation targets.
desktop-app-packages.label: Desktop app packages
desktop-app-packages.reason: Matched desktop application or Homebrew Cask metadata.

package-ecosystem-tools.description: Packages that install, publish, inspect, or automate other package ecosystems.
package-ecosystem-tools.label: Package ecosystem packages
package-ecosystem-tools.reason: Matched package manager, installer, dependency, registry, or publishing metadata.

npm-cli-packages.description: npm packages with local package pages and command-line or developer workflow metadata.
npm-cli-packages.label: npm command packages

python-cli-packages.description: PyPI packages with local package pages and command-line or developer workflow metadata.
python-cli-packages.label: Python command packages

brew-utility-packages.description: Homebrew packages with local package pages that need at least one crawlable package-graph path.
brew-utility-packages.label: Homebrew utility packages
